text.title: Design System Drift Dashboard Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: input → procedure → output report.

input.description: Consumer repo list + v2 token map + Token→component mapping + Sign-off threshold

trace.step: Clone each repo at HEAD; load v2 token map and component mapping.
Grep each repo for hardcoded literals; classify as adoption or drift.
Emit JSON drift report + Markdown exec summary.
